name: Ashened to Endlessness
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>果</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>てなき<ruby lang="jp"><rb>灰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During the Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Pyro Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck using monsters from either field, including "Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction", and if you do, it gains 500 ATK for each material used. You can banish this card and 1 DARK Pyro monster from your GY; all monsters your opponent currently controls become Pyro until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Ashened to Endlessness" once per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Pyro Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck using monsters from either field, including "Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction", and if you do, it gains 500 ATK for each material used. You can banish this card and 1 DARK Pyro monster from your GY; all monsters your opponent currently controls become Pyro until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Ashened to Endlessness" once per turn.

mentions: Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction
action: Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the opponent's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
